title: physocarpus alternans var. annulatus
intro: Physocarpus alternans var. annulatus, also known as 'Golden Anvils', is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving pain. The herbal preparations of Physocarpus alternans var. annulatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for various health issues.
